# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Setup Node.js and install dependencies
        run: |
          echo "Setting up Node.js"
          node --version
          npm config get registry
          npm install
        env:
          NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL: error
      - name: Log environment variables
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Environment Variables:"
          printenv | sort
      - name: Run command and log output
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Running command..."
          my-command --option=foo --another-option=bar
          echo "Command output:"
          cat /dev/null
      - name: Log deployment details
        run: |
          echo "Deployment Details:"
          echo "API Response: $(curl -s https://example.com/api/response)"
          echo "Connection String: $CONNECTION_STRING"
      - name: Upload artifacts and deploy
        uses: appleboy/scp-action@v0.10.1
        with:
          host: $HOST
          username: $USERNAME
          key: $PRIVATE_KEY_FILE_PATH
          source: 'build/**
          target: '/var/www/html'
